overview: GrassRoots Functional Medicine provides functional medicine treatment for chronic health conditions through comprehensive lab testing and root-cause analysis, followed by an 8-12 month intensive care program combining doctor visits, nutritionist support, and health coaching.
highlights: Comprehensive lab testing at the cellular level
Gut health and microbiome restoration protocols
On-site therapies including hyperbaric oxygen and infrared sauna
targetAudience: Individuals with chronic health issues seeking root-cause diagnosis and treatment rather than symptom management.
